globalHeaders.content-security-policy: default-src 'self' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.gstatic.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self';
